item.title: World’s Biggest Abandoned Bi-Plane Found
item.description: A look at the world’s biggest abandoned bi-plane, with commentary on what makes it stand out and the story behind the find. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:title: World’s Biggest Abandoned Bi-Plane Found
media:content.media:description: A look at the world’s biggest abandoned bi-plane, with commentary on what makes it stand out and the story behind the find. What details stand out to you?

item.title: Attempting to Start an Abandoned Private Jet
item.description: A long-idle private jet is inspected and tested to see if it can be brought back to life after years of sitting unused. Will the engines still respond?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to Start an Abandoned Private Jet
media:content.media:description: A long-idle private jet is inspected and tested to see if it can be brought back to life after years of sitting unused. Will the engines still respond?

item.title: First Try on a Difficult Plane
item.description: A first attempt with a plane known to be difficult, with real-life commentary and reactions. The video focuses on the experience and how it went overall. What would you have expected from a first try?

media:content.media:title: First Try on a Difficult Plane
media:content.media:description: A first attempt with a plane known to be difficult, with real-life commentary and reactions. The video focuses on the experience and how it went overall. What would you have expected from a first try?

item.title: Private Jet for $158,900?
item.description: A surprisingly low-priced private jet raises questions about ownership costs, maintenance requirements, and hidden challenges. Is it really a bargain, or is there more to the story?

media:content.media:title: Private Jet for $158,900?
media:content.media:description: A surprisingly low-priced private jet raises questions about ownership costs, maintenance requirements, and hidden challenges. Is it really a bargain, or is there more to the story?

item.title: Will It Run and Drive 926 Miles Home?
item.description: A straightforward look at whether the vehicle can make the 926-mile trip home, with real-life commentary and reactions along the way. What would you check first before a long drive?

media:content.media:title: Will It Run and Drive 926 Miles Home?
media:content.media:description: A straightforward look at whether the vehicle can make the 926-mile trip home, with real-life commentary and reactions along the way. What would you check first before a long drive?
